title: Revert pull error handling from 881
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

This PR reverts the code put into play for Policy Rejection Error handling with #881.  It leaves the test code that was submitted in that PR in place as that PR found prior issues in our tests.  I'm suggesting that we merge this in now and build v1.3 with this version.  When a bad image is requested to be pulled, the pre-existing error, although not great, is shown:

```
# buildah from docker://registry1.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minima
image "docker://registry1.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minima" not found in /etc/containers/registries.conf registries: image not known
```

After v1.3 ships, we can then revisit using #907, #908, or more likely #909 next week when we've time to investigate more fully.

This passes the bats tests on my vm and also the baseline tests.

@mtrmac and @rhatdan thanks for your help and guidance on these changes.  I truly appreciate it.

comments.body:
I agree.  We can work with @mtrmac to fix the problem correctly.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 2be67ba has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 2be67ba7f97c28719c317961a74453dd143c69c8 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
